sections.paragraph:
Original: כּר

Transliteration: kar

Phonetic: kar

BDB Definition:

  1. howdah, palanquin, basket saddle
    1. an enclosed riding space erected on a camel's saddle
  2. pasture, meadow
  3. ram, lamb, he-lamb
  4. battering-ram

Origin: from H3769 in the sense of plumpness

TWOT entry: 1046a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
